# app-switcher

Open app switcher

## Usage

```bash
agent-device app-switcher
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- None

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | No |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
